narrative:
Paint township has 1,314 registered voters, with 63.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 1.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 33.5 percentage points.
